title: Automation for sub tasks - reminders based on date
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m trying to create automation that would remind the assigned person on each sub task a few days before the sub task is due. Is there a way to do this?

posts.author: spincus (Sara Pincus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m trying to create automation that would remind the assigned person on each sub task a few days before the sub task is due. Is there a way to do this?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sara,
You should look into using Zapier or Make (or just use the Monday API) to help get this automated.
Cheers,
Harsh

posts.author: spincus (Sara Pincus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sara Pincus:

I’m trying to create automation that would remind the assigned person on each sub task a few days before the sub task is due. Is there a way to do this?

Thanks. I’m surprised there is no simpler solution!

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, the automation is something like ‘when a date arrives notify BLANK’ but under the ‘when’ piece you can set it to. a few days before.
